DEFT PC995 MOTION TO SET ASIDE THE INFORMATION - FILED
/CAL:PC 995 MOTION TO SET ASIDE THE INFORMATION/DAWT/LD:01-21-20/MO PC 1385:PEOPLE NOT ABLE TO PROCEED & SUSTAIN THEIR BURDEN AT TRIAL & DISMISSALCODE 72/
/CAL:JURY TRIAL, LD 01-21-20, TE 2-3 WEEKS/CTORD:ELECTRONIC MONITORING GPSTERMINATED & REMOVED/CTORD:MATTER OFF CALENDAR FOR THE FOLLOWING REASON:CASE DISMISSED IN S28 TODAY/

/CAL:BAIL MOTION/MO GRTD/OR/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT SHALL BERELEASED WITH COORDINATED PICK-UP/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/WS/X:COURTNOTES THE PEOPLE DO NOT OBJECT TO THE REINSTATEMENT OF ELECTRONIC MONITORING,/X:FUTURE HEARING DATES CONFIRMED,/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAW/DEFTARR/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/LDTR:01-21-20/987,2/TE:2-3 WEEKS/CONTD:PTC IN DEPT, 23 & JURY TRIAL IN DEPT, 22/DOP/

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING & PD BAIL MOTION/WITEXCL:THE COURT/INVOFF:SFPD OFC,WILL PALLADINO/WIT SWORN DA:EDCEL SUAREZ/EXHMA:PEO 1 - 8,5 X 11 INCH COLOR PHOTOGRAPH/EXHM:PEO 2 - VIDEO ON HARD DRIVE/WIT SWORN DA:SFPD OFC TIMOTHY BROPHY/EXHMA:PEO 3 - 8,5 X 11 INCH COLOR PHOTOGRAPH/WIT SWORN DA:SFPD OF PERNISHA BATTLE/EXHMA:PEO 4 - 8,5 X 11 INCH COLOR PHOTOGRAPH/WIT SWORN DA:SFPD OFC WILL PALLADINO/EXHMA:PEO 5 - 2 PAGE DOCUMENT/EXHM:PEO 6 -DVD/HTA1:1/CTORD:THE MISDEMEANOR IS CERTIFIED TO SUPERIOR COURT/OR/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORDAND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO REPORT TO 70 OAK GROVE BY 12:00 PMON THE NEXT BUSINESS DAY/CTORD:DEFENDANT SHALL BE ON HOME DETENTION/WS/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/X:EXHIBITS MARKED AND ADMITTED INTO EVIDENCE, ARE ORDERED RETURNED/X:TO THE OFFERING PARTY PENDING FURTHER ORDER OF COURT,/CONTD:ARRAIGNMENT/DOP/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/LDPX:11-08-19/987,2/ORNAS/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED WITH COORDINATED PICK-UP/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/WS/CONTD:PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/
